name: dev-forge
description: Development forge: project-setup, design-to-spec, project-scaffold, task-execute (systematic execution + progress tracking), e2e-verify (cross-project Playwright E2E), seed-forge (realistic seed data), product-verify (static + dynamic acceptance). Full pipeline: /project-forge. 开发锻造套件：项目引导、设计转规格、脚手架生成、任务执行、跨端验证、种子数据锻造、产品验收。全流程编排：/project-forge。
